anomalies.name: Negative Refractive Index
anomalies.description: Certain structured materials exhibit n < 0, violating conventional Snell's law and Drude model predictions

anomalies.name: Sub-Diffraction-Limit Imaging
anomalies.description: Perfect lens using metamaterials recovers evanescent waves, theoretically breaking Abbe diffraction limit
anomalies.expression_latex: d_{\min} = \frac{\lambda}{2\text{NA}} \quad\text{(classical limit — violated by metamaterial lens)}
